# Security Policy

## Reporting Vulnerabilities

Please report suspected vulnerabilities through GitHub's private vulnerability reporting for this repository:
https://github.com/ZarK/ai-qube/security/advisories/new

Do not open public issues for secrets, exploits, or unpublished vulnerabilities.

## Supply Chain Changes

Changes to publishing, dependencies, package metadata, CI workflows, adapters, plugins, and release automation are treated as supply-chain sensitive. Pull requests touching those areas should include explicit verification notes and should not be merged while reviewer or CI concerns remain unresolved.
